name: create_session_valid_owner
description: CreateSession with non-empty APIKeyOwner should succeed

name: create_session_empty_owner
description: CreateSession with empty APIKeyOwner should return error

name: restore_session_full
description: RestoreSession should reconstruct Session from persisted state

name: update_summary_valid
description: UpdateSummary should set the summary and update updatedAt

name: update_summary_failed
description: UpdateSummary with error state should be reflected in Failed()

name: update_score_valid
description: UpdateScore should set the score values

name: is_owned_by_matching
description: IsOwnedBy with matching owner should return true

name: is_owned_by_non_matching
description: IsOwnedBy with non-matching owner should return false
